prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约16004→16229→13381→33484→34316名，2021–2023年基本稳定在1.3–1.6万名区间，2024年新高考首年因选科要求变 化（物理+化学/物理+不限分组）导致位次大幅后移至33484名，2025年进一步后移至34316名，2025年基准位次约34316名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年7 人、2022年7人、2023年7人、2024年37人、2025年77人，新高考后大幅扩招；2026年计划84人，较2025年增加7人，扩招约9.1%，竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大 学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第125名，近年排名稳定在124–131名之间，整体处于全国中上水平；该校在声誉监测文件中无显著负 面或正面记录，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第105位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高；历史投档异常记录中无该校信息；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学 获评A-，与物理类招生的经济统计学、金融学类等专业相关；计算机科学与技术、电气工程等工科专业虽无A类学科评估，但社会热度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐/推荐，报考热度持续升温；广西2026年普通高考考生总数约39.2万人，物理类考生按近年占比约69%估算约27.05万 人，较2025年（26.04万）增加约3.9%，竞争略有加剧但扩招幅度更大；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，属东北地区，广西考生跨省报考存在一定地域偏好差异；该校在广西物理类招生规模从2024年起大幅扩大，2026年计划84人，招生体量已较为可观。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年新高考选科分组导致的位次重塑已基本完成、2026 年计划扩招约9.1%及考生总量温和增长等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约36217名，区间35717–36717名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 16004 → 16229 → 13381 → 33484 → 34316. From 2021 to 2023, rankings were stable in the 1.3–1.6 million range. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao, due to changes in subject selection requirements (Physics+Chemistry/Physics+Unrestricted grouping), rankings dropped significantly to 33484, and further to 34316 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 34316. Enrollment plans for this university in Guangxi Physics Category were 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 77 in 2025, with significant expansion after the new Gaokao. The 2026 plan is 84, an increase of 7 from 2025, an expansion of about 9.1%, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 125th, with recent rankings stable between 124–131, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. There are no significant negative or positive records in reputation monitoring files, and public opinion is stable. On Douyin, it ranks 105th in popularity, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms. There is no information on historical admission anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A-, related to majors like Economic Statistics and Finance under Physics Category. Although Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering, and other engineering majors do not have A-class discipline evaluations, they have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended/socially popular, with rising application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 270,500 based on a recent proportion of about 69%, an increase of about 3.9% from 2025 (260,400). Competition has slightly intensified, but the expansion is larger. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region. There are certain regional preference differences for Guangxi examinees applying across provinces. The enrollment scale for this university in Guangxi Physics Category has significantly expanded since 2024, with 84 planned for 2026, making the enrollment size considerable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the ranking reshaping due to the new Gaokao subject grouping in 2024–2025 has largely been completed, the 2026 plan expansion of about 9.1%, and the moderate increase in examinee numbers, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 36217, with a range of 35717–36717.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 35717), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology.
